g.text: Scope

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: what you have access to at any particular execution point in your code

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: (moment in time, line you are executing and where its located)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Scope

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Global - either within a file or all code running

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Function Scope - variables scoped to functions (includes parameters)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Block Scope - within if statement blockes, for loops, random curly braces
